Consciousness.title: Consciousness
Consciousness.description: A measurement of how alert and responsive this character is. If this falls too low, this character will collapse, enter a coma, or die.

Blood.title: Blood
Blood.description: A representation of the amount of blood in this character's body. Losing too much blood will lead to fatality.

Pain.title: Pain
Pain.description: A measure of how much pain this character is in. Too much pain can cause this character to collapse.

Mobility.title: Mobility
Mobility.description: This shows the current mobility of the character, representing their ability to move and perform physical actions.
